terms.definition: Software-Defined Radio using the RTL2832U chipset. ravenSDR uses the RTL-SDR Blog V4 with R828D tuner.
Command-line FM demodulator from the rtl-sdr package. Tunes to a frequency and outputs raw PCM audio to stdout.
Pulse-Code Modulation — raw uncompressed digital audio. ravenSDR uses 16kHz, 16-bit, mono PCM throughout the pipeline.
13 TOPS edge AI accelerator NPU on the Raspberry Pi AI Hat. Runs Whisper inference for speech-to-text.
Hailo Executable Format — compiled neural network model file for Hailo NPU hardware.
CTranslate2-based Whisper implementation used as CPU fallback when Hailo NPU is not available.
ALSA loopback kernel module — creates virtual audio devices for routing PCM between processes.
Abstraction layer that wraps Tuner (SDR) and StreamSource (web stream) behind a unified PCM queue interface.
Open-source streaming media server protocol. Used by wxradio.org and other community radio streams.
Automatic Picture Transmission — analog image format transmitted by NOAA weather satellites on 137 MHz.
Rafael Micro tuner IC in RTL-SDR Blog V4. Better sensitivity and lower noise floor than R820T2.
DC power injection on the RF coax. V4 has software-controllable 4.5V bias tee for external LNAs. Off by default.
Root Mean Square — used for signal level measurement and silence detection in the audio pipeline.
WebSocket-based real-time communication library. Used for transcript, status, and signal level delivery to browser.
Wide-band FM — demodulation mode used for broadcast FM stations (88-108 MHz). Uses 200kHz bandwidth.
